batch_summary.note: Aug 2025: 1 primary RF-09 signal. S009 — gaslight accusation via Olivia relay, DARVO-inversion. Arc ACTIVE (9 signals).

primary_flags.cross_rf: RF-04 (visit refusal DARVO cluster B-028 ROW-14237-14275); RF-08 (relay mechanism)
primary_flags.message_text: ROW-14243: 'The conversation led her to scream into the couch and cry cause you kept trying to gaslight her about it'
primary_flags.summary: Aug 2025: Melissa accuses Eli of gaslighting Olivia during a reported conversation. Context: Labor Day weekend visit refusal cluster. ROW-14243: 'The conversation led her to scream into the couch and cry cause you kept trying to gaslight her about it' — Melissa reports to Eli that he 'gaslighted' Olivia during their conversation, producing extreme distress (screaming, crying). This is a compound mechanism: (1) DARVO-inversion: Melissa accuses Eli of the RF-09 behavior she is engaged in; (2) Olivia relay: Melissa's account of Olivia's distress is used to make the accusation; (3) RF-04: reframes Eli's boundary-holding conversation with Olivia as traumatizing psychological manipulation. Evidence Level E: reality-questioning without specific denied claim and without cross-referenceable contradiction. Sev-1: single instance in isolation; escalated arc context (arc already ACTIVE, S006 Sev-2 sustained). ADD-004: 6th+ documented 'you gaslight' instance. ADD-003 compound: explicit gaslight accusation within DARVO cluster → RF-09+RF-04 compound COMP-RF09-006.
